title: Really easy night vision
body: This mod is really cool use night vision no op or ask a admin or friend it is so easy you only need OP two commands /allplayersnightvision and /removeallplayersnightvision but else the other commands is no OP like /nightvision and /nightvisionoff and /checkmodrunningnightvision and /versionnightvisionmod and made by emr09 [Link to video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JxFJaEXzykU) <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/JxFJaEXzykU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
